summary: Company Registration (Devenir Chauffeur) with C# Sync and Hotel Invoice Module Testing Complete. Backend: 7/7 API tests passed. Frontend: All flows working - page loads, form validation, registration submission, and Hotel Admin invoice views.

issues: React hydration warnings in console due to Emergent preview system wrapper elements injecting <span> into <select>, <tbody>, <option> - cosmetic only, does NOT affect functionality

backend_tests.company_register_success_with_csharp_syn: PASS - POST /api/company/register creates company in MongoDB and calls C# API, returns csharp_synced field

backend_tests.company_register_missing_required_fields: PASS - Returns 422 Unprocessable Entity when required fields (password) are missing
backend_tests.company_register_phone_formatting: PASS - Phone number with country code formatting works correctly
backend_tests.company_register_optional_fields: PASS - Registration works with minimal required fields only
backend_tests.csharp_api_connectivity: PASS - C# API at https://api.zont.cab is reachable

verified_features: Company registration form at /become-driver loads with all required fields
Form validation: Terms checkbox required, passwords must match
Company registration submits to backend and shows success message
Backend saves company to MongoDB with csharp_synced status tracking
Duplicate email registration blocked with clear error message
Super Admin Hotel Payments page shows all invoices with filters
Super Admin can see pending/paid status and 'Payer' buttons
Hotel Portal Facturation page shows hotel-specific invoices
Hotel can see payment history and download invoices
critical_code_review_comments: Company registration correctly implements dual-save pattern (C# API + MongoDB)
Phone number formatting handles leading 0 removal for international format
csharp_synced boolean properly tracks sync status with csharp_error for debugging
All data-testid attributes properly implemented on BecomeDriver.js form fields
Form validation happens client-side before API call (good UX)
Password is hashed before storing in MongoDB (security best practice)

seed_data.invoices: 3 invoices exist for period 2026-03 (Bristol=paid, Negresco=pending, W Barcelona=pending)
seed_data.companies: Multiple test companies created during testing with TEST_/e2e-test- prefix emails

context_for_next_testing_agent: Company registration flow fully tested with C# sync verification. The C# API at api.zont.cab is REAL (not mocked). Phone numbers are formatted as +33XXXXXXXXX (leading 0 stripped). Hotel invoice module unchanged from iteration_25 (still working). React hydration warnings are from Emergent preview wrapper - cosmetic only.

mocked_api.note: C# API at https://api.zont.cab is REAL and operational. All APIs are real, hitting MongoDB and external C# backend.
